items.title: Earnings live: Keurig Dr. Pepper stock pops, Waste Management and Whirlpool slip with Big Tech results on deck
items.description: Third quarter earnings season is ramping up, and analysts expect S&P 500 companies grew their profits by 8% during the quarter.

items.title: This Small Oil Stock Is Soaring. It Figured Out the Data Center Game.
items.description: Investors are ready to reward any company that can provide electricity quickly, even if it isn’t its main source of business.

items.title: Jim Cramer on Caterpillar: “I Think It’s Due for Some Profit-Taking”
items.description: Caterpillar Inc. (NYSE:CAT) is one of the stocks in focus in the game plan Jim Cramer shared. Cramer noted that the stock is a “little tougher” for him, as he commented: “There’s also Caterpillar. Now, this one’s a little tougher for me. I fear its stock has moved up too much as a monster performer […]

items.title: CAT to Report Q3 Earnings: Can Volume Recovery Offset Tariff Woes?
items.description: Caterpillar is set to post lower Q3 earnings despite modest revenue growth, as tariff-driven cost pressures weigh on margins.
